name: hap-mongodb-slowlog-analysis
description: Analyze MongoDB 4.4 slow logs and provide practical optimization guidance, including default-value rewrites for non-index-friendly predicates.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze MongoDB slow logs and suggest practical fixes
interface.longDescription: Analyze pasted or uploaded MongoDB slow logs, group repeated query shapes, explain why they are slow, and provide practical query rewrites and index optimization advice. It prefers default-value exact-match rewrites for null, empty string, empty array, negative predicates, and other non-index-friendly conditions.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this MongoDB slow log and explain why it is slow.
Group repeated slow queries and suggest indexes.
Generate practical optimization advice for this MongoDB log.
Rewrite non-index-friendly empty checks into default-value exact-match queries.
